# =============================================================================
# Test C — pompa radia 0x661 | tryb KEEPALIVE
# Plik: v03_C_KA_pompa_2026-04-11.txt
# =============================================================================
#
# PRZED NAGRANIEM
#   • MODE:KEEPALIVE + Enter
# SCENARIUSZ
#   • Między SYS:CAN:WAKE_START a SYS:CAN:WAKE_END: okresowe ramki 0x661 (~150 ms)
#   • Po WAKE_END: pompa 0x661 ma ustać do następnego WAKE_START
# UWAGA
#   • W logu seriala szukaj linii 0x661: … (jeśli firmware je wypisuje); ewentualnie dopisz obserwację z CAN sniffera
#
# =============================================================================

# PROBLEM:
#   komunikacja sztucznie podtrzymywana w nieskończoność
#
# ZDARZENIA:
#   jedno wybudzenie światłami

# --- METADANE FIRMWARE ---
# Wersja: v03 | Tryb: MODE:KEEPALIVE | Test: C (regresja 0x661)
# Patrz: NM_COMMUNICATION_VALIDATION.md — sekcja „Test C”
# ---

# --- LOG SERIALA / notatki z busa: wklej poniżej ---

Entering Configuration Mode Successful!
Setting Baudrate Successful!
SYS:HW:READY
SYS:CAN:NM_MODE_KEEPALIVE
SYS:CAN:WAKE_START
0x42B:0B 02 80 02 00 00
0x351:01 00 00 00 00 00 00 80
0x359:5F 01 00 00 00 00 00 00
0x42B:0B 01 00 00 00 00
0x527:07 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0x2C3:10
0x653:40 00 40
0x60E:08 00
0x62F:00 00 00 00
0x65F:00 00 00 00 00 57 56 57
0x35B:07 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0x2C1:00 00 80 00 00
0x651:80 03 59 AF 29 48
0x470:00 00 00 00 00
0x621:00 08 79 00 00
0x571:92 00 00 00 00 00
0x575:00 20 00 80
0x635:00 00 00
0x551:00
0x655:75 00 60 3F 5C 10 00 00
0x575:10 20 00 80
0x42B:0B 02 80 02 00 00
0x351:01 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0x42B:0B 01 00 00 00 00
0x527:00 01 00 00 00 00 00 01
0x65D:BF 90 78 04 00 10 17 15
0x65F:01 5A 5A 5A 31 4B 5A 36

0x557:00 00 00 3F 0C 00 00 00
